endpoint_schema.title: Pipedrive Deals
endpoint_schema.description: Returns an array of deal objects from the Pipedrive sales pipeline

id.description: The unique ID of the deal

has_pic.description: Whether the creator has a profile picture (0/1)

active_flag.description: Whether the creator user is active

user_id.description: The user who owns the deal

has_pic.description: Whether the owner has a profile picture (0/1)

active_flag.description: Whether the owner user is active

person_id.description: The person (contact) associated with the deal

owner_id.description: Owner user ID of the person

org_id.description: The organization associated with the deal

people_count.description: Number of people in the organization

owner_id.description: Owner user ID of the organization

stage_id.description: The ID of the stage the deal is in

value.description: The monetary value of the deal

currency.description: The currency code of the deal value (e.g., USD, EUR)

add_time.description: The creation date and time of the deal (format: YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS)

update_time.description: The last update date and time of the deal (format: YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS)

stage_change_time.description: The last time the deal stage was changed (format: YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS)

status.description: The status of the deal (open, won, lost, deleted)

probability.description: The success probability percentage of the deal

next_activity_date.description: The date of the next activity associated with the deal

next_activity_time.description: The time of the next activity associated with the deal

next_activity_id.description: The ID of the next activity associated with the deal

last_activity_id.description: The ID of the last activity associated with the deal

last_activity_date.description: The date of the last activity associated with the deal

lost_reason.description: The reason the deal was lost

visible_to.description: The visibility setting of the deal (1=owner only, 3=owner's visibility group, 5=owner's visibility group and sub-groups, 7=entire company)

close_time.description: The date and time the deal was closed (won or lost)

pipeline_id.description: The ID of the pipeline the deal is in

won_time.description: The date and time the deal was marked as won

first_won_time.description: The date and time the deal was first marked as won

lost_time.description: The date and time the deal was marked as lost

products_count.description: The number of products attached to the deal

files_count.description: The number of files attached to the deal

notes_count.description: The number of notes attached to the deal

followers_count.description: The number of followers of the deal

email_messages_count.description: The number of email messages associated with the deal

activities_count.description: The number of activities associated with the deal

done_activities_count.description: The number of completed activities associated with the deal

undone_activities_count.description: The number of incomplete activities associated with the deal

participants_count.description: The number of participants in the deal

expected_close_date.description: The expected close date of the deal

last_incoming_mail_time.description: The date and time of the last incoming email

last_outgoing_mail_time.description: The date and time of the last outgoing email

label.description: The label assigned to the deal

stage_order_nr.description: The order number of the stage within its pipeline

person_name.description: The name of the person associated with the deal

org_name.description: The name of the organization associated with the deal

next_activity_subject.description: The subject of the next activity

next_activity_type.description: The type of the next activity

next_activity_duration.description: The duration of the next activity (HH:MM:SS)

next_activity_note.description: The note of the next activity

formatted_value.description: The deal value formatted with currency symbol

weighted_value.description: The weighted value of the deal (value * probability)

formatted_weighted_value.description: The weighted value formatted with currency symbol

weighted_value_currency.description: The currency code of the weighted value

rotten_time.description: The date and time when the deal became rotten (stale)

owner_name.description: The name of the deal owner

cc_email.description: The CC email address assigned by Pipedrive for linking email conversations to this deal

user_id.description: Filter deals by the owner user ID. If omitted, all deals for the account are returned.

filter_id.description: Filter deals using a predefined Pipedrive filter ID

stage_id.description: Filter deals by pipeline stage ID. If omitted, all stages are returned.

status.description: Filter deals by status. One of: open, won, lost, deleted, all_not_deleted. Default is all_not_deleted.

sort.description: Field name and sort direction to order results (e.g., 'update_time DESC'). Supported fields: id, title, value, add_time, update_time, stage_id, status.

owned_by_you.description: When set to 1, only deals owned by the authenticated user are returned. 0 returns all deals.
